zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Piers Peter Warburton於大約1489年出生在英國爾阿爾 霍爾時，他的父親Sir John Warburton31歲，母親Lady Jane Stanley Warburton27歲。他於1519年與Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton在英國英格蘭爾阿爾 霍爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年6月5日在英國爾阿爾 霍爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯聖 瑪麗 安德 哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Piers Peter Warburton于大约1489年出生在英国爾阿爾 霍爾时，他的父亲Sir John Warburton31岁，母亲Lady Jane Stanley Warburton27岁。他于1519年与Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton在英国英格兰爾阿爾 霍爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年6月5日在英国爾阿爾 霍爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯聖 瑪麗 安德 哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Piers Peter Warburton was born about 1489, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir John Warburton, was 31 and his mother, Lady Jane Stanley Warburton, was 27. He married Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton in 1519, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 June 1550, in Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in St Mary And All Saints' Church, Great Budworth, Cheshire, England.

Il a épousé Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton en 1519, à Arley Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juin 1550, à Arley Hall, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary And All Saints' Church, Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Peter Warburton è nato il circa 1489 nel Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Warburton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Stanley Warburton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton nel 1519, nel Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 giugno 1550, nel Arley Hall, Cheshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary And All Saints' Church, Great Budworth, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Peter Warburtonが約1489年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルリー ハルで生まれた時，父Sir John Warburtonは31歳，母Lady Jane Stanley Warburtonは27歳であった。1519年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルリー ハルでLady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年6月5日にイギリスチェシュアイアアルリー ハルで62歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルススト マリー アンド アル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary and All Saints Church, Great: 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스 스트 메리 앤드 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Peter Warburton(이)가 대략 1489년 영국 체실르 알리 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Warburton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Stanley Warburton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알리 홀에서 Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 6월 5일 영국 체실르 알리 홀에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스 스트 메리 앤드 앨 세인츠' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Peter Warburton nasceu aproximadamente 1489, em Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Warburton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Stanley Warburton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton em 1519, em Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de junho de 1550, em Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary And All Saints' Church, Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Mary and All Saints Church, Great: ст мэри анд алл сеинц' чурч, грит будворт, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Piers Peter Warburton родился около 1489 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Warburton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Stanley Warburton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton в 1519 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 июня 1550 г. в местности арли холл, чешир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри анд алл сеинц' чурч, грит будворт, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Antoinette Elizabeth Winnington Warburton en 1519, en Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de junio de 1550, en Arley Hall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary And All Saints' Church, Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
